# Spline

Piecewise polynomial interpolation that creates a smooth curve through ordered waypoints.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Geometry</span>
  <span>interpolation, smoothing, path generation</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Collect ordered waypoints] --> B[Choose spline type and boundary conditions]
    B --> C[Solve spline coefficients]
    C --> D[Evaluate curve and derivatives]
    D --> E{Continuity and smoothness acceptable?}
    E -- No --> F[Adjust knots or constraints]
    F --> C
    E -- Yes --> G[Use sampled path]
```

## Notes

- Cubic splines are a common default because they balance smoothness and simplicity.
- Boundary conditions determine endpoint derivatives and overall shape.
